'''鈭歡-p-k-ng''' ('''kagapkengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volumise|volumise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volumise|volumise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-p-k-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagapkengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigapkengoko|thigapkengoko]] || [[word:jigapkengoko|jigapkengoko]] || [[word:shigapkengoko|shigapkengoko]] || [[word:kigapkengoko|kigapkengoko]]
